title: Resilience and Adaptation to Advanced AI
summary: Article framing how societies can build resilience against the disruptions advanced AI is likely to bring.

title: Societal Adaptation to Advanced AI
summary: Research paper laying out how societies might adapt to advanced AI — what adaptation means, what mechanisms are available.

title: Navigating the uncharted: Building societal resilience to frontier AI
summary: AISI blog post on what societal resilience to frontier AI looks like in practice.

title: Weapons of Math Destruction — Cathy O'Neil at Google
summary: Talk on how opaque algorithms reshape lives at scale — accessible introduction to the social impact of algorithmic systems.

title: Perspectives of Traditional Religions on Positive AI Futures
summary: Project surveying how different religious traditions imagine positive futures with AI — useful for thinking about pluralism in AI values.

title: Building AI for the pluralistic society
summary: Google Research post on what it would mean for AI systems to serve a pluralistic society rather than flatten it to a single set of values.

title: Benchmarking Overton Pluralism in LLMs
summary: Paper proposing a benchmark for whether LLMs surface a plural range of views rather than collapsing to a single dominant one.

title: Out of This Box (an AI safety musical)
summary: A model for what it looks like to present AI safety as a creative artist. Browse for inspiration on how the questions can be told as story, song, performance.
